fullText:
Schnarch’s Four Pillars of Balance in relationships

Solid flexible self — knowing who you are without needing agreement.

Quiet mind, calm heart — self-soothing (vs. needing the other to soothe you).

Grounded responding — staying regulated under their reactivity instead of fusing or fleeing. This is literally "say the true small thing and don't move."

Meaningful endurance — tolerating discomfort for growth. The friction tolerance.

fullText:
牛津和斯坦福大学搞的一个让AI当端到端的数据记者，从原始数据一路干到可交互成品报道的工具：Data2Story

找数据、跑统计、选角度、做图表、拟稿排版这些脏活儿累活儿给AI，人工负责定选题、把关创意

把一篇高质量数据新闻从新闻编辑部几周时间压缩到小时级，搞新闻的可以看看

目的不是让AI代替写稿，而是给一个自带审计功能的协作系统，选题你定，它只负责把数据挖透、把证据链焊死、把交互图表做好

它用多智能体系统模拟完整的新闻编辑部workflow

首先它的证据可追溯性，系统会把每一个数字、角度和素材追溯到原始数据、代码或者外部参考文献，确保所有论断都有据可查

最后生成多模态新闻成品，不是有图就行，而是根据内容自动选择最佳载体

比如说讲世界杯各城市气温差异时，生成交互式热力地图；分析音乐音高变化时嵌入音频对比等等

对需要处理大量数据、跑统计、做可视化，时间/技术有限的数据新闻记者；或者想做深度数据报道的小型新闻编辑部比较实用

#AI记者 #AI新闻 #Data2Story

fullText:
4 COOL BATTERY INNOVATIONS BY CATL

Here are some innovations and takeaways from my visit to CATL:

 1: Cell-to-Pack (CTP) Bypasses Modules To Maximize Energy Density

CTP eliminates internal module boxes entirely and placing cells directly into the pack wrapper

CATL's Qilin architecture frees up space to achieve a 72% volume utilization efficiency.

 2: Hybrid Battery Chemistry Solves Cold-Weather Power Drops

The Freevoy system mixes different chemistries inside a single casing.

This pairs high-energy lithium cells with cold-resistant sodium cells

This creates a fallback to maintain performance in freezing temperatures.

 3: Manufacturing Scale Enables Big, Ongoing R&D

CATL commands dominant market share

So their 10% of revenue R&D allocation allows them to outspend rivals on structural and chemical engineering simultaneously.

Read here for more. 

https://t.co/pUpcfwcRxA

fullText:
We need governance built for the agentic era.

As agents increasingly act on enterprise data, governance can no longer stop at access. It has to control what AI can do, give agents the context they need to understand the business, and offer the choice to work across clouds, regions, formats, and platforms.

Today, we're advancing Unity Catalog with:
- Unity AI Gateway to govern models, agents, tools, MCPs, and their runtime interactions
- Glossary and Domains to create a shared semantic foundation for business concepts and context
- Cross-cloud, cross-region governance and expanded interoperability across open formats and more

Now, your foundation is ready for the next generation of AI applications and agents. https://t.co/6jRRETvM0F
